areas.name: hermes-integration
areas.summary: 3 HIGH + 5 MEDIUM + 8 LOW + 2 H-EXTRA. All FLAGGED per safety rails. Live ping/calendar/update OK; SSE 401 needs browser-session verification.

areas.name: kanban
areas.summary: No source defects. 4x StrictMode duplication (dev-only). TTFB 1456ms in dev (re-measure in prod).

areas.name: calendar
areas.summary: 3 HIGH + 5 MEDIUM + 9 LOW + 5 INFO. H1 dedupe FIXED (commit 0cd3be2). H2 unpaginated Scan deletes orphans = FLAGGED.

areas.name: chat
areas.summary: 2 CRITICAL (no auth on /api/chats; /api/chat/approve missing session check). 7 WARNING. See SECURITY-SUMMARY.md.

areas.name: terminal
areas.summary: 2 CRITICAL (middleware disabled + allow-list only validates first token = anonymous remote command exec). 9 AUTO-SAFE deferred until auth restored.

areas.name: agents
areas.summary: 3 CRITICAL (no auth on mutations; seed?force=1 overwrites user edits; PATCH zero validation). 6 WARNING. See SECURITY-SUMMARY.md.

areas.name: memory
areas.summary: 3 CRITICAL (no auth; unpaginated Scan + filter-after-limit). WR-02 dynamic-import FIXED (commit 0cd3be2). 6 other WARNING.

areas.name: auth
areas.summary: Middleware fully disabled (matcher: []). Comment says 'Auth temporarily disabled — restore when Google OAuth is configured'. Root cause of CRITICAL findings in chat/terminal/agents/memory.

areas.name: dashboard
areas.summary: Renders, TTFB 511ms (within budget), 11 API calls (5 unique x 2 StrictMode), no console errors.

flagged_items: CRITICAL-AUTH: middleware.ts disabled — opens chat/terminal/agents/memory mutation surface
CRITICAL-TERMINAL: anonymous remote command exec via /api/terminal/execute (CR-01+CR-02)
CRITICAL-CHAT: /api/chats GET/POST/DELETE open + chatId only 20 bits enumerable
CRITICAL-MEMORY: PUT accepts arbitrary Partial<Memory> with no whitelist
HIGH-CALENDAR: H2 unpaginated Scan in orphan-cleanup deletes valid rows once table > 1MB
HIGH-HERMES: 16 items from hermes-integration-iter-1.md (directOnly swallow, cache invalidation drift, SSE [DONE] loop, etc.)
BUILD: next@14.2.5 critical security advisory; major upgrade out of auto-fix scope
auto_safe_fixes_applied: calendar: dedupe sync to 1 per load (commit 0cd3be2)
